title: Redundant parentheses should be avoided
description: Redundant parentheses should not be usedAnalyze your codeconsistency-conventionalmaintainabilityCode SmellQuick FixIDE quick fixes available with SonarQube for IDEunusedfindingWhy is this an issue?Redundant parentheses are simply wasted keystrokes, and should be removed.Noncompliant code example[MyAttribute()] //Noncompliant class MyClass { public int MyProperty { get; set; } public static MyClass CreateNew(int propertyValue) { return new MyClass() //Noncompliant { MyProperty = propertyValue }; } }Compliant solution[MyAttribute] class MyClass { public int MyProperty { get; set; } public static MyClass CreateNew(int propertyValue) { return new MyClass { MyProperty = propertyValue }; } }Available In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbu
recommendation: Remove the problematic code and refactor as needed.

logic.detection_conditions: Identifies redundant parentheses in attributes and object initialization
logic.triggering_conditions: Pattern matches '[Attribute()]' or 'new Class() { }' where parentheses are unnecessary
logic.reasoning: Detects redundant parentheses in attribute declarations and object initializers. The pattern identifies cases like '[Attribute()]' which can be simplified to '[Attribute]' and 'new Class() { }' which can be 'new Class { }'. Excludes cases where parentheses are required for parameters or specific syntax rules.
